title: Create: Tipped Arrows
description: This Create Addon makes tipped arrows craftable by using a spout with a potion-fluid on an arrow.
body:
Create: Tipped Arrows is a tiny addon for the Create Mod that brings industrial automation to archery. Stop wasting time with lingering potions and manual crafting—let your factory do the work!

Features:
   * Spout Tipping: Automatically tip your arrows! Use a Spout to pour any Potion Fluid onto a standard Arrow to create its Tipped variant.
   * Item Drain Emptying: Want your potion back? Place a Tipped Arrow on an Item Drain to extract the potion fluid and recover a clean Arrow.
   * Bulk Washing: Use a Fan with Water (Splashing) to wash the effects off Tipped Arrows, returning them to their base form.
   * Spectral Crushing: Put those Spectral Arrows to good use and crush them into Glowstone Dust using the Crushing Wheels.
